data.content: What are the home loan rates?

The indicative interest rates for home loans as of April 2026 range from 8.40% to 9.25%. These rates are linked to the External Benchmark Lending Rate (EBLR) or Repo Rate. 

For a personalized quote or to explore further details, I recommend using the 'Loan Calculator' available on our website.

_Disclaimer: Educational purposes only._

For a loan of ₹600,000 at an interest rate of 10% over a period of 5 years, the monthly EMI (Equated Monthly Installment) would be approximately ₹12,748.23.

_Disclaimer: Educational purposes only._
can I visit the bank on a 4th Saturday at 2:00 PM?

Unfortunately, the bank is closed on the 2nd and 4th Saturdays. Therefore, you will not be able to visit the bank on the 4th Saturday at 2:00 PM. You can visit on weekdays from 9:30 AM to 4:00 PM, or on the 1st and 3rd Saturdays from 9:30 AM to 1:00 PM.

_Disclaimer: Educational purposes only._
